name: Auxiliary validation rule for Peripheral & I/O Security #13
description: Verify configuration matches parameters for UTSCF-PIO-13 in Peripheral & I/O Security category.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper auxiliary validation rule for peripheral & i/o security #13 settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on Auxiliary validation rule for Peripheral & I/O Security #13. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `status=enabled` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "status=enabled", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-PIO-13", "cost": "LOW", "estimated_time_hours": 2}
